subcodes.first_line: This is the Day wherein from the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree is heard: "The Promise hath been fulfilled, and He Who is the Lord of Names hath appeared." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه یسمع من حفیف سدرتی المنتهی قد اتی الوعد و ظهر مالک الاسماء و من
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @call to action
